title: Better Desert Well
description: Desert wells got a use, each desert well will spawn with a magic hopper
body:
## Better Desert Wells

Desert wells got a use, each desert well will spawn with a magic hopper requiring 1 random item. Once the item is dropped into the well the hopper will turn into a reward.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26e2bb283862b383957cc1a8d6698e437216973a.png)
